pagedata.pyDescription: Resolve and close a case and all child cases. Cleans up all open assignments on close.
pagedata.pyUsage: Intended for use as a local action in case types.
pagedata.pyDeleteMemo: bug-230785 - needed new FA that uses existing section and CM API activity to resolve case
pagedata.pySourceStream:
<% tools.putSaveValue("bClientValidation", "true"); %> <% tools.putSaveValue("FlowActionValidate", "NO_VALIDATION"); %> <%pzAuto.getSection().includeShowMeHarnessInsert();%> <%tools.putParamValue("flowActionUIRef","pySetStatusResolved"); %> <% tools.putParamValue("pyShowFAButtons","false"); String bshowFAButtons = tools.getParamValue("pyShowFAButtons"); tools.putParamValue("pyCustomizeFALabels","false"); tools.putParamValue("pySubmitLabel","Submit"); tools.putParamValue("pyCancelLabel","Cancel"); tools.putParamValue("pyNextLabel","Next"); tools.putParamValue("pyPreviousLabel","Previous"); tools.putParamValue("StreamType","Rule-Obj-FlowAction"); %><% if(pzAuto.isInspectMode()){ %> ><% } %><%if(pega_uiengine_offlinesupport.pzIsForOfflineTemplate()){%><%pzPackageRuntime.packageSection("pySetStatusResolved",tools.getStepPage().getReference(), null);%>
<%} else {%><%includeSectionBody_1();%><%}%> <%tools.putParamValue("pyShowFAButtons",bshowFAButtons);%><% if(pzAuto.isInspectMode()){ %><% } %>

rowdata.pyParametersParamDesc: Status with which the Workobject needs to be closed
Should PrimaryPage be used as context for Parent case closure?
